chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Made Permissible and Prohibited in Marriage

text: 4479 - وَ رَوَى اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ عَلاَءٍ وَ أَبِي أَيُّوبَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "لاَ يَتَزَوَّجِ اَلْأَعْرَابِيُّ اَلْمُهَاجِرَةَ فَيُخْرِجَهَا مِنْ دَارِ اَلْهِجْرَةِ إِلَى اَلْأَعْرَابِ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4479 - Imam Abu Ja'far Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) said:
"An Arab man should not marry a Muhajira woman (a woman who migrated for the sake of faith) and then take her out of the land of migration to the land of the Arabs."
